flags.ambiguity: GI-001 [from A-001] paraphrases the operator-stays-generic invariant in tokens that drift from the transcript wording.
ST-001 [from A-002] omits the F4 ASSAY guard the transcript names as the COMPLETED to ARCHIVED gate.
CT-001 [from A-003] drops the EVIDENCE_MISMATCH error case the transcript locks.
A-004 commits to Python 3.11 but no row carries the runtime invariant explicitly.
GI-002 [from A-006] elides the no-caching-layer clause the transcript locks.
CT-001 [from A-007] picks bcrypt unilaterally while the transcript leaves bcrypt vs argon2 unresolved.
